summary: 生成全新 4 层 13x13 经典魔塔，先清空现有 floors 后重建。整体以清晰主路、分支取舍、钥匙门压力和逐层增强的战斗节奏为核心；资源总量固定且可计算，保证存在通关路线，但不鼓励无成本全清。
fixed_rules: Do not generate floor maps in stage 0.
Use tile code 0 as the only passable/default ground and tile code 1 as the only wall terrain.
Avoid complex story, random systems, script-heavy mechanics, plugin mechanics, new assets, UI work, and decorative novelty.
No required outer wall border; topology should be defined by walls, doors, monsters, nets, and tools.
Enemy special abilities are limited to 1, 2, 3, 15, and 18; each monster may have at most one special ability.
layout_policy: Each floor must have one readable main route plus 1-2 meaningful side branches.
Use yellow doors for frequent local pressure, blue doors for medium-value branch decisions, and the red door as a late critical gate.
Do not place naked piles of high-value resources; valuable rewards require combat, key cost, or route commitment.
Keep stair access structurally clear, but gate progression with visible combat/resource checks rather than hidden mechanics.
Avoid large empty areas and repeated wall padding.
Enemy tiles may not be orthogonally adjacent; diagonal contact is allowed.
Adjacent floors should share part of the monster tier pool while introducing stronger enemies and retiring weak low-tier enemies.
Potion and gem totals should not decrease on higher floors; normal floor-to-floor increases stay within 0-2 items.
confirmation_prompt: Confirm this whole-tower brief before floor generation.
